project.name: MetaBrainz
project.description:
MetaBrainz believes in free, open access to data. It has been set up to build community maintained databases and make them available in the public domain or under Creative Commons licenses.
Our data is mostly gathered by volunteers and verified by peer review to ensure it is consistent and correct.

We have multiple “projects” under the MetaBrainz umbrella, such as MusicBrainz and ListenBrainz; all can be viewed here.
